sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׂראלה

Transliteration: yeśar'êlâh

Phonetic: yes-ar-ale'-aw

BDB Definition:

Jesharelah = "these are upright"
  1. a Levite and son of Asaph and leader of the 7th course of the musicians

Origin: by variation from H3477 and H410 with directive enclitic

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
